subcodes.title: Words to E.C. Getsinger, spoken on 1900-10-02
subcodes.first_line: In the Gospel it is said 'I am the Vine, the Father, the Husbandman.' Mohammad said that God is as a tree.
subcodes.subjects: @return of the Manifestations of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @John the Baptist, @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations
